title: Comparatives: rewrite with the comparative form

items.prompt: This box is (heavy) than that one.
answer: This box is heavier than that one.
items.explanation: A one/two-syllable adjective ending in -y changes to -ier: heavy → heavier.

items.prompt: A train is (fast) than a bus.
answer: A train is faster than a bus.

items.prompt: This book is (interesting) than the film.
answer: This book is more interesting than the film.
items.explanation: Adjectives of three or more syllables use 'more': more interesting.
A short vowel + single consonant doubles the consonant: hot → hotter.

answer: My bag is better than yours.
Her garden is bigger than mine.
items.explanation: Double the final consonant after a short vowel: big → bigger.
